name: orchestration
description: Subagent orchestration discipline: delegation contracts (self-contained prompts, compressed evidence-backed returns, model/effort tiering, scout-then-fanout, writer isolation), verification panels (refuter voting, judge panels, loop-until-dry, completeness critic), and agent conventions (engineer/reviewer naming taxonomy, one-surface PROACTIVELY arbitration, the shared apply-fixes contract). Includes /orchestration:review.
